column1: Irina_Phoenix: Phel just taught me how to do this today.
adiamant: wow, I'm used to be on the other side of the handicap :)
Irina_Phoenix: haha. I'll take that as a no.
adiamant: I played some, but I am still learning a lot
adiamant: I got 9 stones from Phel :P
C[adiamant: I played some, but I am still learning a lot
adiamant: I got 9 stones from Phel :P
adiamant: but I think I can win that.... we'll see
C[Irina_Phoenix: I forget on these ones you have to submit it. We were playing a live game.
adiamant: it's a game that takes a while to get :)
C[adiamant: I've been trying for probably over 20 years, on and off :p
adiamant: but this time it's starting to stick, I think
adiamant: I can only stay a couple more minutes, but we can keep this on as a web game, we just got a jump start on :)
C[Irina_Phoenix: Have a good day, Adia. :)
C[Phelan: [21:13\] Irina_Phoenix: I forget on these ones you have to submit it. We were playing a live game. -> you can change that if you press the ""check mark"" icon to the left
C[adiamant: otherwise that would have been my play
C[adiamant: and now I'm off, catch you later
C[adiamant: good! had a friend over for some gaming :)
C[adiamant: yeah, Goa, Roma, Bohnanza, and lots of crokinole
C[Irina_Phoenix: cool. I don't know any of those, but glad u had fun! :)
C[adiamant: come to bgg.con and I'll teach you some of them at least :P
Irina_Phoenix: eh.. not this year. maybe down the road, though. deff. at some point
adiamant: don't think you can make two eyes anywhere
Irina_Phoenix: I think I have like, four points.
adiamant: my c1 killed that group
adiamant: you can do b1 and live
adiamant: but if I play b1 you're dead
Irina_Phoenix: but that's superfluos, bc wouldn't that cone be removed?
adiamant: not if I can play b1
adiamant: play something else and I'll show you :)
adiamant: should have done that instead of the moves on the top right
Phelan: It's a concept known as ""two eyes"". If you have a group surrounding two separate spaces, there's no way to kill it by playing inside.
Phelan: If there is only one space that can't be divided in two, then the opponent can kill it
Phelan: I can do a small lesson on this, I still have the examples I gave rgatti on this
C[Phelan: I've been trying, but you haven't made any mistake. :(
Phelan: in such a small board
C[bkarrigan: i'm not even sure wtf i was thinking there
C[adiamant: And here I go, returning the favor. Le sigh.
adiamant: Heh, was just trying to make a note so I remember what I think I should do
C[adiamant: Yup, that was the game right there. Good game!
bkarrigan: gg to you as well
adiamant: Him thanks, and you too
adiamant: Him thanks, and you too
C[adiamant: Going away on vacation, back on the 13th
Phelan: sorry, didn't notice the message before
Phelan: hope you had a good vacation. :)
C[adiamant: ahh! too many cutting points!
C[ohgrande: don't expect much.  this will be my first game!
adiamant: No worries, have to start somewhere.
C[adiamant: No worries, have to start somewhere.
C[ohgrande: How long have you played?
C[adiamant: Hard to say, I have been trying to pick it up for over 25 years
adiamant: but this iteration is the first one (of 4-5) that I think I'm actually getting somewhere
C[ohgrande: I'd prefer to not undo moves if you don't mind, but, let's chat about this point in the game when we end
ohgrande: there are some interesting things here
adiamant: yeah.. I just saw that a second after I made my move :(
adiamant: it's been there for 4-5 moves already
C[adiamant: and that's probably the game
C[ohgrande: I'd imagine that you had the same reaction that I did when I made my previous move
ohgrande: right after move 27, I noticed it and went, ""doh!""
ohgrande: have you played around with the ""Analyze Game"" button?  It's pretty nifty
ohgrande: I learned quite a few things
ohgrande: play again and switch colors?
adiamant: sure. Thanks for the game as well.
C[Phelan: This White 2 is a bit cramped. In the beginning, going for more space is usually better.
Phelan: Good attack. This severely limits the white stone's space
Phelan: ugh, I thought this was putting chats at the time of the move
C[saisaysplaygo: I totally didn't see that ladder!
saisaysplaygo: going to have to come-from-behind now :)
adiamant: yeah, with such a small board that's all it takes. Only took one for me to lose to Ohgrande :)
C[adiamant: You said connecting is best... Lets see if it works here
C[Phelan: Connecting is not always the answer, otherwise Go would be an easy game. :p
Phelan: a way to think about it is that instead of being a territorial war, Go is a battle between two people trying to connect their stones and separate their opponent's.
Phelan: with that said, your move was good, and safe.
C[adiamant: Of course it's not always right :) but I might not be using it enough, playing the hane too much
adiamant: i thought about it here too, but I think with the handicap stones, I don't need to be on the attack all that much, right?
Phelan: but the handicap stones are supposed to give you an advantage
Phelan: part of that advantage is that you can attack me easier
Phelan: but that is good too
C[Phelan: Nothing else I can do on the bottom right corner :p
adiamant: Thanks, and sure. 3 stones then?
C[adiamant: We'll have to go over this in the analysis - how to deal with the crosscut here
C[Phelan: extending that way is not a bad one
Phelan: this crosscut happens a lot in handicap games. Don't forget that you have a stone advantage, and that I am trying to complicate things, as that's where I know my advantage is.
C[Phelan: extending from a crosscut is usually safe, as long as other factors don't make another move better
Phelan: I just noticed that one
Phelan: thought you might miss it :p
C[adiamant: Read last week again about bent four in the corner, so I was happy to find it here :)
C[adiamant: Wish I didn't need to start it so early though, you have plen of ko threats
C[Phelan: If you had started it at game end, it was dead by japanese rules, not even a ko
Phelan: but you lose nothing by starting it
Phelan: I have the more to lose
Phelan: the japanese call it a ""flower viewing ko""
Phelan: english players translate it as picnic ko
adiamant: yeah, saw that, but if I don't start it, can't you just play there and live?
Phelan: Yes, but it's one less move I get elsewhere
C[adiamant: Good point. But not too many other moves for you at this point that I can see. And I don't have nearly enough ko threats with all the approach moves I need
adiamant: Nor are they big enough to justify you letting go of ~20 points?
C[Phelan: yep, but it still means that you get them in sente(you play and keep initiative)
Phelan: if you had played D1 and E1, you're making me making two eyes in the lower left corner more and more urgent
Phelan: basically, you playng there loses you nothing
Phelan: to me, it would lose sente(initiative), and disrupt what control I had over the game
C[adiamant: right, so it was a bit premature...
adiamant: I was just so happy to have seen it :)
C[adiamant: Thanks for the game. I'd love to go again, but going on vacation so not sure I can do it in a timely manner. Let's start when I come back, early September
ohgrande: GG - how about moving to a 13x13?
C[saisaysplaygo: This game was fun.  One giant battle!  Sorry for the timeout
C[adiamant: Didn't play much 13x13 at all, but let's try :)
adiamant: Also, going on vacation tomorrow, so might be a bit sluggish, if you don't mind we can play - or start a new one when I get back in September, your call
ohgrande: we can keep it slow.  If we need to pause due to your break, I'm good with that too
C[ohgrande: we can keep it slow.  If we need to pause due to your break, I'm good with that too
C[adiamant: nice! good timing on that one. I was considering invading there next move
C[adiamant: You are definitely not 30k... o_O are you hustling me? :P
ohgrande: just trying to pick it up
ohgrande: you all are helping me learn quickly
C[ohgrande: but, I've been reading the basic books so hopefully I'm learning
ohgrande: but nothing compares to playing and trying things out so thanks for that!
C[adiamant: shouldn't click without thinking - I knew that was coming :(
C[ohgrande: I hate it when I do that
adiamant: was a close game otherwise
ohgrande: I think you were slightly ahead though
ohgrande: at least it felt that way to me
ohgrande: did you have a nice vacation a few weeks back?
adiamant: And yes, Oregon was great. Way better than we even expected
ohgrande: I was on a temporary assignment in the Portland area a few years ago
ohgrande: there are some pretty places up there
C[adiamant: Very interesting. I'll probably want to come back here and figure out if the cap is better
ohgrande: I think that response was better
ohgrande: but then again, maybe it would end up better overall
C[adiamant: Seemed like it creates too many cutting points
C[ohgrande: that little invasion was very effective for you
adiamant: Thanks. I kept trying to get a ko so I can use the top situation as a ko threat, but couldn't.
adiamant: at least no stupi dim stakes like before :)
C[ohgrande: I think that was a clever move
C[ohgrande: no way out of that one!  nice catch
C[ohgrande: I've played a few.  I like it
C[ohgrande: I saw that you're playing Mage Knight
ohgrande: that's one of my favorites
C[adiamant: yes, great game, but only managed to play it a couple of times, so needed a reminder. My wife was out of town for a week, so I managed to get it to at least play a little solo.
C[adiamant: If you can live in there, that's it. If not, it's going to be close. So I have to not let you live :)
C[ohgrande: living is going to be tough I think
ohgrande: I think it's close though and has been a good game
C[Phelan: Sorry for stopping the game, but I don't think White could win this, and I don't want the tournament to drag.
C[robb.effinger: Hmm... seems I messed up.. My last move should have been H8 instead of G8
robb.effinger: Not that I'm convinced it would have mattered!
C[adiamant: response to H8 is the same as here - J6
adiamant: so no, I don't think it would have mattered much
C[robb.effinger: I don't get to capture the H7 group, but my F8 group is stronger for it, since I get H8 and G8 that way
C[adiamant: right - but I don't think any of them can live, eventually
adiamant: the 9 stone handicap seems way too strong on such a small board
robb.effinger: I certainly agree with that :)
C[robb.effinger: And ya, I think you're right
robb.effinger: I think I'm a stone short of the corner group living
C[robb.effinger: I think it may be concession time
robb.effinger: (to be fair, it's probably long past...)
rgatti: Hmmm, this looks like a harsh handicap...
rgatti: Hmmm, this looks like a harsh handicap...
C[adiamant: sure does. I am used to getting handicap, not giving it :)
adiamant: we need to tweak that handicap a little bit I think
Phelan: yeah, I've proposed ""reduced handicap"" to the developers. basically, it's normal handicap minus X stones.
Phelan: I've also asked them to consider changing how they deal with handicaps in small boards
Phelan: a stone difference is much bigger here
C[adiamant: yes, should be scaled some
C[Phelan: Yeah, next tournaments I won't use handicap unless we can scale it
C[mfl134: that was an accident due to my phone.
C[mfl134: I feel I should know if your stones are alive or dead
C[adiamant: I think that now they're dead
C[mfl134: it is one of the weirder life/death situations i have ran into
C[mfl134: the was a phone error
C[mfl134: sorry, any chance you will let me undo that, it was my bad just playing too fast
C[adiamant: I clearly didn't think this one through... :(
C[ohgrande: that was one I read about.  there are quite a few surprising endgame moves
C[ohgrande: yeah, I figured that would be coming
C[adiamant: I'll take what I can get :) . At least salvage something from that fiasco
C[ohgrande: I think you've got this one now
adiamant: I think I do too
adiamant: less than komi. Pretty close
ohgrande: yeah, it felt close the whole game
C[adiamant: I went through that probably twenty times already, but when it's time to make the move, I make the wrong one ... sigh
C[rgatti: Was there a right one?  I hadn't seen it, if there was.
adiamant: not really, but L1 looked like the least wrong for a while :)
C[adiamant: A tie on the board. Nice! Thanks for the game.
C[ohgrande: thanks. you made a nice reduction of the middle so maybe I can get a bit back :)
C[ohgrande: it's looking grim for black
C[adiamant: agreed. I think you can create a ko fight at the top left, but with what's at stake, I don't think you can win it. Maybe good for a few points elsewhere on the board.
C[ohgrande: well, that could have gone better. nice job!
adiamant: Thanks! I was really excited when I saw the possibility of killing that upper left group. Without it, it would have been really close.
adiamant: Hello! Sorry I'm late to the party
adiamant: I'm going away on vacation, heading for Nova Scotia. Back on the 13th
C[saisaysplaygo: wow!  have a great time
C[saisaysplaygo: excellent.  I forgot what my plan was with this game
C[adiamant: Wow, I sure messed that one up
C[adiamant: Maybe we can have a live match at bgg.con. I wonder if they have a set
adiamant: My travel set is very crappy. My home one is nice if you get to boston sometimes :)
C[saisaysplaygo: I don't think there was a way to kill my C17 stone
saisaysplaygo: sure!  I'm a lot worse live :)
adiamant: No probably not. But I could contain it better
C[saisaysplaygo: why does it say info requested?
C[saisaysplaygo: keeping the ko fight would've made things really messy!
adiamant: not that they aren't messy
adiamant: I think I went wrong somewhere in my analysis
C[saisaysplaygo: O10 didn't put any pressure on me and allowed me to cut off your group
adiamant: yeah. I was trying to make an eye for after the ko fight is over, didn't count on your connecting
adiamant: and T11 was your crucial play
C[saisaysplaygo: those life and death problems are paying off :-)
C[saisaysplaygo: just a bunch of forcing moves.  I don't see any big plays left
C[adiamant: yeah, a bunch of 1 point moves
